description: Triggered when the user wants to write cold outreach emails, B2B prospecting sequences, SDR emails, or follow-up emails for sales development.
should_trigger: Write a cold email to CTOs at Series B startups about our developer tool
Create a 5-email cold outreach sequence for our SaaS product
Help me write a prospecting email to VPs of Engineering with a relevant trigger
Write a breakup email for our cold outreach sequence
Draft a cold email targeting fintech companies after their funding announcement
Review my cold email — it's not getting replies
should_not_trigger: Write a welcome email sequence for new trial users
Create a newsletter for our marketing blog subscribers
Draft an email announcement for our new feature release
Write copy for our pricing page email capture form
